channel.title: I can't work Material-tailwind with frontity
channel.description:
Hello everyone, I have a problem in the development of my Frontity Project. Install @material-tailwind to my project to speed up the design phase, but I run into the problem that it can't call existing components. ![image|416x499](upload://tBBehbzxj7gX0cwdwpHR6G9XOlE.png) Voy intentando resolver ya 1 día completo, si alguien me podría ayudar. Gracias <!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->

item.title: I can't work Material-tailwind with frontity
item.dc:creator: bc.ayrton
item.description:
Hello everyone, I have a problem in the development of my Frontity Project.
Install @material-tailwind to my project to speed up the design phase, but I run into the problem that it can’t call existing components.


Voy intentando resolver ya 1 día completo, si alguien me podría ayudar. Gracias

Read full topic
item.source: I can't work Material-tailwind with frontity
